title: oreocnide obovata var. paradoxa
intro: Oreocnide obovata var. paradoxa, also known as Chinese gall or Szechuan gall, is a plant species in the family Urticaceae, typically found in the mountainous regions of China and Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and its use as a hemostatic agent. The health benefits of Oreocnide obovata var. paradoxa include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress. In traditional herbal preparations, Oreocnide obovata var. paradoxa is often combined with other herbs and used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
